caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with the gold word "BOSS" on the chest, and a watch on his left wrist is seated at a desk in a studio setting. He wears headphones and speaks into a professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a white wall features the phrase "Where BOSSES Talk!" and a logo that says "UNION HUSTLE" next to several gold stars. A black mug with red text that reads "TALK OUT" is positioned on the desk. As the scene progresses, the man gestures with his right hand, moving it from his side toward the center of the frame to emphasize his point. His facial expression remains focused and animated as he continues to speak, while the camera maintains a consistent medium shot of him from the waist up.
